sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11382" key="a)pando/keutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπανδόκευτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n11382.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without an inn to rest at,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὁδός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:230" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">230</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
